anchors.name: model-context-protocol

evidence.evidence: MCP servers table declaring context7 with resolve-library-id and query-docs tools; 'Always call resolve-library-id first to get the correct library ID, then pass it to query-docs.'

anchors.in_repo_mcp_config_path: n/a (no .mcp.json at repo root; verified absent)

configured_servers_inferred.scope: documentation lookup for libraries (Vite, Biome, etc.) used while authoring
configured_servers_inferred.installation: operator-installed at Claude Code global MCP config level

anchors.search_note: Profile-confirmed absent: no .mcp.json file at repo root. context7 is referenced as available via Claude Code's global MCP config, not project-scoped. Sibling new-direction-2026 has identical pattern (AAF-NDM-008).

anchors.name: a2a-agent-to-agent-protocol

evidence.evidence: Profile §agent_surface.protocol_surfaces.a2a recorded: 'Grepped for agent-card, a2a, .well-known/agent.json — zero matches.'

anchors.rationale: Static-site presentation layer. No agent cards, advertised skills, or task-state contracts.

evidence.evidence: No HTTP API. Static HTML output deployed to GitHub Pages. Profile §agent_surface.protocol_surfaces.workflow_contracts.api_descriptions: [].
No workflow descriptions in repo.
No overlays; no OpenAPI surface to augment.

anchors.name: json-schema

evidence.evidence: $schema points to https://biomejs.dev/schemas/2.3.8/schema.json — Biome's tool-config schema, not a project-defined runtime contract.

anchors.rationale: Only JSON Schema in repo is Biome's own tool-config schema; not a runtime payload contract.

evidence.evidence: 'Never add external font loading, tracking scripts, or heavy dependencies' — no analytics, no telemetry. Profile baselines.observability.tracing: 'none'.
No runtime LLM calls in product code; agents are external CLI tools (Claude Code, Cursor).
context7 MCP is operator-installed at global Claude Code level; no in-repo MCP tracing emission.
No media generation; content is operator-authored static HTML/CSS. Profile baselines.provenance.content_provenance_position: absent.

anchors.name: slsa-build-source-provenance

evidence.evidence: permissions: contents:read, pages:write, id-token:write — id-token enables OIDC for actions/deploy-pages@v4. Profile baselines.provenance.build_source_provenance_position: 'partial'; no explicit SLSA attestation declared.

anchors.rationale: actions/deploy-pages@v4 embeds run metadata (run ID, commit SHA) but no explicit SLSA-compliant attestation. Recorded informational; not weighted under operator's career-transition-readiness theme.

evidence.evidence: No computer-use harness; agents that operate on this repo do so via Claude Code's external sandbox model.
No browser-use harness in repo.
Dependencies: only @biomejs/biome + vite. No Anthropic/OpenAI/Google SDKs.

anchors.name: html5

evidence.evidence: Required rule: 'Use semantic HTML5 with proper heading hierarchy'. Reinforced by .cursor/rules/html.mdc (auto-attached on *.html).

anchors.rationale: HTML5 is the output contract for the static site. Not a protocol surface; recorded informational.

anchors.name: vite-build-tool
anchors.rationale: Build-time only; the deployed artifact is plain static HTML. Vite is not a runtime contract.

anchors.name: biome-linter-formatter

evidence.evidence: "@biomejs/biome": "^2.3.8"

anchors.rationale: Build-time linter/formatter; serves as static-analysis fitness function. Two rules at warn-not-error (AAF-VGH-003) route to Phase 9.

anchors.name: github-actions-pages-deployment

evidence.evidence: 3-job pipeline (quality → build → deploy) uses actions/checkout@v4, setup-node@v4, configure-pages@v4, upload-pages-artifact@v3, deploy-pages@v4. Actions are major-version-pinned (@v4/@v3), not SHA-pinned (AAF-VGH-010).

anchors.rationale: Deployment platform contract. Authority concern (third-party action authority breadth) routes to Phase 6 via AAF-VGH-010.

anchors.name: nist-ai-rmf

evidence.evidence: Operator strategic theme is career-transition-readiness, not regulatory-readiness. NIST AI RMF is not weighted.

anchors.pinned_version: AI RMF 1.0 (Jan 2023; not verified at run time)
anchors.audit_note: Recorded for completeness; findings will not be scored against NIST AI RMF.

anchors.name: owasp-genai-llm-agentic-risk

evidence.evidence: Operator strategic theme is career-transition-readiness, not agent-safety-hardening. OWASP GenAI is not weighted.

anchors.pinned_version: unverified at run time (operator did not request scoring)
anchors.audit_note: Recorded for completeness; findings will not be scored against OWASP GenAI.

summary.primary_anchor_for_this_audit: context7 MCP (operator-installed, not project-scoped, not pinned; AAF-VGH-009; routed Phase 4)
